name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
   \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
   \/ /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
   \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = forks

(* Invariant: fork ownership *)
TypeOK == /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] \in 0..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag, maxNum

Init == /\ num \in [1..N -> 1..N]
        /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ maxNum \in 1..N

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N: /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                     /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
                     /\ maxNum' = maxNum + 1
        \/ \E i \in 1..N: /\ flag[i] = TRUE
                     /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
                     /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
                     /\ maxNum' = maxNum

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxNum>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
  /\ 
  \/ /\ count < K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
        /\ count' = count + 1
        /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
  \/ /\ count > 0
     /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count - 1
        /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
  \/ /\ count = K
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count
        /\ q' = q
  \/ /\ count = 0
     /\ head' = head
        /\ tail' = tail
        /\ count' = count
        /\ q' = q

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K
          /\ q \in [1..K -> 0..1]
          /\ Cardinality({i \in 1..K |-> q[i] = 1}) = count

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ r \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = store[k]]
TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ epsilon > 0

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
            /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
            /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
            /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
            /\ epsilon' = epsilon + 1
        /\ \E i \in 1..N :
            /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
            /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
            /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Avg == (1/N) * Sum(i \in 1..N : clocks[i] + offsets[i])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
       /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ \E p \in free:
            /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
            /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
            /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
            /\ free' = free \cup {p}
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ allocated' = allocated
          /\ free' = free

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq free
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Client: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
        \/ /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES counts

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Nat -> Nat]
          /\ \A i \in Nat : counts[i] \in Nat

Init == /\ counts \in [Nat -> Nat]
        /\ \A i \in Nat : counts[i] = 0

Next == /\ \A i \in Nat : counts[i] \in Nat
        /\ \A i \in Nat : counts'[i] \in Nat
        /\ \A i \in Nat : counts'[i] = counts[i]
        /\ \E i \in Nat : counts'[i] = counts[i] + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
